  organization: flat

  processing: moderate
  navigation: 2-tier
  maintenance: condition-based
  schema: moderate
  automation: full

vocabulary:

  notes: "notas-tecnicas"
  inbox: "inbox"
  archive: "archive"
  ops: "ops"

  # Level 2: Note types
  note: "nota técnica"
  note_plural: "notas técnicas"

  # Level 3: Schema field names
  description: "descripción"
  topics: "temas"
  relevant_notes: "notas_relacionadas"

  # Level 4: Navigation terms
  topic_map: "mapa de módulo"
  hub: "inicio"

  # Level 5: Process verbs
  reduce: "documentar"
  reflect: "enlazar con código"
  reweave: "actualizar"
  verify: "validar"
  validate: "auditar"

  # Level 6: Command names (as users invoke them)
  cmd_reduce: "/documentar"
  cmd_reflect: "/enlazar"
  cmd_reweave: "/actualizar"
  cmd_verify: "/validar"
  cmd_rethink: "/revisar"

  # Level 7: Extraction categories (domain-specific)
  extraction_categories:
    - name: "decisiones de arquitectura"
      what_to_find: "Decisiones sobre estructura, patrones, bibliotecas elegidas"
      output_type: "nota técnica"
    - name: "patrones de código"
      what_to_find: "Patrones descubiertos en el código, convenciones del proyecto"
      output_type: "nota técnica"
    - name: "módulos y componentes"
      what_to_find: "Documentación de módulos funcionales y sus responsabilidades"
      output_type: "nota técnica"
    - name: "problemas y soluciones"
      what_to_find: "Bugs resueltos, workarounds, soluciones técnicas"
      output_type: "nota técnica"

platform_hints:

  allowed_tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash]
  semantic_search_tool: null
  semantic_search_autoapprove: []
